hero.alt: AI Appointment Scheduling Dashboard showing automated scheduling and calendar management

useCases.alt: Built for the Modern Enterprise - AI appointment scheduling dashboard

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Hello! Thank you for calling PrimeNest Realty. I’m your AI appointment assistant, available twenty four seven to help you schedule, reschedule, or manage property visits. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Hi, I want to book an appointment to visit a flat I saw on your website.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Absolutely. I can take care of that for you. To get started, may I know if this visit is for buying or renting?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Buying.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Great choice. Are you looking for a one BHK, two BHK, or three BHK?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: A two BHK.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Perfect. May I ask — is this for self use or for investment?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Mostly for investment.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Understood. Based on your preference, I see a few excellent two BHK options available in your area with strong rental potential. Would you prefer an in person site visit or a virtual tour?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: An in person visit would be better.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: No problem at all. I have openings tomorrow between eleven a.m. and one p.m., or the day after tomorrow between four p.m. and six p.m. Which works better for you?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Tomorrow around noon would be good.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Great. I’m booking your site visit for tomorrow at twelve p.m. Just to confirm — two BHK, investment purpose, in person visit, tomorrow at twelve p.m. Is that correct?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Yes, that’s correct.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Perfect. Your appointment is confirmed. You’ll receive a WhatsApp confirmation, a calendar invite, and property location details.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Would you like me to also share pricing and expected rental returns before your visit?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Yes, that would be helpful.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: The property is priced at eighty six lakhs, and similar units typically generate thirty two thousand to thirty five thousand rupees per month in rent. I’ll include this information in your confirmation message.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: No, that’s all. Thank you.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You’re very welcome. I look forward to assisting you throughout your property journey. Have a great day.
